title: Apply for the EDUFI -internship at FIME
content:
FIME is looking for a university intern to Beirut for autumn 2026 through the Finnish National Board of Education’s EDUFI application.

An internship at FIME offers an interesting perspective on the work of a research institute in the Middle East. The intern will support the institute’s operations by assisting with a diverse set of tasks including: active participation in organizing the institute’s events and courses, and in the practical implementation of the institute’s communications. In terms of communications, the institute’s website and social media channels (Instagram, Facebook) in particular are part of the intern’s focus areas. In addition, finding writers for Paikan päältä -blog,
creator: FIMEn harjoittelija
sourceTitle: Finnish Institute in the Middle East
